responses.text: A large number of women are unemployed during the epidemic, with 280,000, 140,000, and 110,000 fewer women working in the hotel, restaurant, and wholesale and retail industries respectively.
People's psychological condition deteriorated by more than 60% during the epidemic.
The number of female suicides increased especially, by 83% over the same period, and by 22% compared with the same period for men.
Depression has also increased in the pandemic in Japan.
The rise in suicide in Japan is blamed on economic pressures, such as social disillusionment over the coronavirus outbreak and unemployment
Women in Japan feel more isolated and are facing rising suicide rates
The limitation of activity and the sense of loss of the meaning of existence have crushed many people with the pain of unseen existence.
According to the National Police Department of Japan, a total of 20,919 people died by suicide in Japan in 2020.
Suicide ranked first among causes of death among 30-34 year olds in Japan
The epidemic has exacerbated women's worries about work, childcare, care and domestic violence, according to the Ministry of Health, Labor and Welfare.
About 40% of suicide prevention organizations in Japan have temporarily closed or reduced their working hours due to the epidemic
Prime Minister of Japan Yoshihide Suga decided to introduce the post of Minister to combat loneliness and isolation.
The number of suicides in Japan decreased by 14% in the spring of 2020 compared to the average of the past four years.
The number of suspected cases of abuse has increased by two times since August.
Since July 2020, the number of suicides in Japan has increased, with the number of female suicides increasing, especially among teenagers.
Social isolation caused by COVID-19 deepened the loneliness and isolation that had existed in Japanese society for more than 30 years because of the changes.
They used to be able to relieve stress by talking to friends, and now they can’t even go to karaoke.
Men are more willing to keep social and personal turmoil hidden and do not show up, so suicide prevention strategies based on the economic and social indicators of men are needed.
Many women in Japan are employed in casual or non-permanent jobs, making them more vulnerable to economic shocks.
The pandemic disproportionately affects the psychological health of children, adolescents and women
Suicide rates increased by 37% among women and by 49% among children and adolescents
The mortality rate of suicide in Japan is higher than in other G7 countries
The family environment in Japan has changed due to the coronavirus epidemic.
Unemployment, social isolation and concern for the future are contributing to the rise in suicide cases in Japan.
The number of single women living alone in Japan has increased significantly.
Japan ’ s October suicides are “more than all Coronavirus deaths this year”
Japan has one of the highest suicide rates in the world, with 18.5 suicides per 100,000 people
Parental pressure increases for women who still have jobs when their children can’t go to school because of the epidemic.
Especially housewives are affected by the pandemic
Japan's suicide rate fell 20% in April from the same period last year, the biggest decline in five years.
The total number of calls received by the domestic peace of mind hotline increased by more than 20% compared to last year.
The number of suicides in Japan reached 21,077 in 2020, the first increase in 11 years, and even 2.5 times the number of deaths from COVID-19.
Suicide rates in Japan declined between 2009 and 2019, but the trend reversed after the outbreak of COVID-19.
Working from home has weakened social structure and culture in Japan, contributing to the increase in loneliness.

Two people were injured when a Palestinian rocket fired in protest against the normalization of relations between the United Arab Emirates, Bahrain and Israel, and Israel responded by bombing the Gaza Strip.
A compromise agreement with the Zionist regime cannot bring peace to Abu Dhabi and Manama
Hamas spokesman Hazem Qasim announced that the Palestinian people will continue their struggle and revolution until the eradication of Zionist settlements from all Palestinian territory.
The Palestinian Authority announced that it would stop implementing all agreements reached with the United States and Israel.
Abbas Zaki, one of the leaders of the Palestinian Fatah movement, said the agreement between Israel and the UAE is a violation of the Arab agreement and a betrayal of Arab countries.
The Palestinian Authority issued a statement praising the positions and support of King Salman bin Abdulaziz, king and Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman of Saudi Arabia, to Palestine and Jerusalem.

The Palestinian people can achieve their legitimate rights in accordance with legitimate international resolutions, the two-state solution and the Arab peace plan, and form an independent Palestinian state with the capital of East Jerusalem.

The Saudi cabinet notes that the kingdom stands with the Palestinian people and supports all efforts to achieve a just and comprehensive solution to the Palestinian issue, which will enable its people to form an independent state equal to the 1967 borders with East Jerusalem.

Ali Barakh, Hamas' representative in Lebanon, said that Bahrain 's decision encourages Israel to continue its crimes such as the blockade of Gaza, the occupation of the West Bank or the denial of the rights of the Palestinian people.

Palestinian groups condemned Arab League members' opposition to the Palestinian draft on the normalization of relations between the UAE and Israel, stressing that it would allow other countries to move toward normalization.

Palestinian Foreign Minister Riyad al-Maliki told reporters in Oslo that whoever is responsible for forming the government, the Palestinians are ready to sit down with him at the negotiating table in order to resume dialogue.
Palestinian President Mahmoud Abbas condemned the move and said that "peace, security and stability in the region will not be achieved unless Israel ends its occupation."

The Arab League at the 154th meeting of Arab foreign ministers chaired by Palestine rejected a Palestinian proposal condemning the withdrawal from the Arab consensus on the agreement on the normalization of relations between the UAE and the Zionist regime.

The spokesman of the Palestinian Authority issued a statement explicitly stating that the Palestinian people strongly condemn the trilateral agreement between the Zionist regime, the United Arab Emirates and the United States.
The “Deal of the Century” sparked outrage from the Palestinians and its rejection by the international community
The number of Koreans who went to plastic surgery hospitals increased sharply during the epidemic.
Iran ranks 10th in terms of attracting health tourists
Dental implants are the best tooth replacement options and the most expensive, which has led to an increase in dental tourism.
Risks in tourism include individual risks for tourists, the responsibility of tourism service providers, destination risks and social risks
Nearly two-thirds of all medical malpractice cases were for cosmetic purposes.
More than 30,000 health tourists have arrived in Shiraz.
Thailand, Hungary, Mexico, Turkey and Ukraine are among the top destinations for dental tourism.
Taiwan is the first choice for many overseas Chinese and foreign people to perform plastic and cosmetic surgery.
A quarter of hospitals are active in health tourism and use their surplus capacity to provide services to foreign tourists.
Americans can save 40% -50% of the cost of treatment by seeking medical treatment overseas.
Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, was named the Best Medical Tourism Destination of the Year by International Medical Tourism Magazine in 2016.

Regaining the trust of patients will be the most important priority for the destination, and research about the destination, as well as the descriptions of patients who have done this type of tourism, is very important in choosing a dental tourism destination.
Medical tourism has become a billion-dollar industry.
South Korea is known as a "plastic surgery paradise".
80% of incoming patients have been directed to private hospitals while excess capacity has been used.
The number of foreigners receiving treatment in Korean cosmetic hospitals increased by 968 compared with the previous year to 48,849.
International Living ranked 24 countries based on 5 ratings, including medical costs, full facilities, hospital quality, skilled doctors and affordable care systems.
Each year, an estimated 20 million “medical tourists ” travel to other countries to seek medical care, including about 1.9 million Americans.
The Yilan City Public Office has turned a number of street corners into small parks
Neighborhood parks are a factor in improving city life.
The presence of pocket parks allows nearby residents to walk, chat, fitness, and enjoy the green, and also lights up the environmental face of the block.
The per capita public green space in Shanghai is only about 8%, while some cities in China are generally more than 10%.
The park features creative environmental protection devices.
The park will have a large area of green space and multi-layer planting to absorb excess rainwater to achieve the functions of water conservation and water storage
The municipal greening and cityscape administration bureau plans to build or upgrade 50 pocket parks this year.
Li Changlin and volunteers transformed the wasteland into a park with flowers, trees, vegetables, and fruits.
Most of the park’s planning aims to create a variety of play spaces to enhance the public’s sense of identity in the park and stimulate curiosity and exploration in children.
Hou De Park has recreational and health facilities with the district office.
A flowerbed with a bridge will be built in the "pocket square" on Enthusiasts street to make it interesting for children to play.
Nangang Park has more than 60 species of plants and a parent-child communion facility.
Hsinchu Mayor Lin Chih-chien said that good parks improve the living environment.
Taichung City to build an barrier-free park
The project aims to improve the quality of life of residents
Neighborhood parks help to improve environmental indicators, reduce density and increase per capita recreation time and mental and physical health of residents.
Large parks in megacities are often far away and not always convenient to get to.
The Green Light Park will meet the needs of all ages.
Luzhou Liuti Park integrates the willow tree pattern into the floor mat and recycles rainwater for watering and toilet water.
Hakusun Park has a theme of “Paper Airplanes ” in Hsichih, with three types of slides and nine stone slides.
Zhubei's park transformation uses a variety of park mats, sand and artificial turf for selection, providing people to touch and experience on the ground.
The project will create urban pocket parks and improve the open space
The city has planted a variety of trees, promote the garden city, shape the city's appearance
The park will add a ramp to make it easier for users such as wheelchairs to enter the park.
Many Israeli fans are trying to travel to Turkey and take pictures with the stars of the series.
The series advertises Turkey's efforts to build military hardware.
The US $40 million series Kingdoms of Fire, jointly funded by the two governments, was broadcast in 2019, highlighting the Ottoman Empire as the tyrant who has ravaged the Arab world for centuries.
Relations between Turkey and Saudi Arabia have deteriorated to the point that even Saudi Arabia’s MBC TV group, which broadcasts Turkish series in Saudi Arabia, stopped broadcasting them last year.
According to an analysis by social media outlet Khuros, more than 620,000 tweets with the hashtag were posted between the first episode of the series in March and the last episode in June.
Turkish TV shows are considered close to the life, culture, and mentality of a simple resident of Uzbekistan, despite being "foreign".
Turkey’s $1 billion in revenue has become the world’s second-largest TV series exporter after Hollywood.
Turkey’s influence in Somalia has been increasing recently.
The media monitoring center at the Press and Information Agency of Uzbekistan concluded that the series contradicts national mentality and traditions, as well as family values of Uzbeks.
Turkey has contributed more than 150 TV series to an estimated 500 million viewers in 146 countries around the world.
The release of Turkish films and series is not the only challenge for home screen networks, as the content of many domestic series is also based on a clumsy imitation of Turkish films and series.
Saudi Arabia wants to export its cultural influence through the film and television industry and break Turkey ’ s cultural influence in the region.
TIKA often acts as a cover for MIT, the National Intelligence Organization of Turkey.

The Minister of Culture and Islamic Guidance stated that a strategic policy in the field of serials and home shows is needed to create a defensive diplomacy against the consumption of foreign series and aggressive diplomacy to export Iranian culture.
The series “Bride of Istanbul” reflects the controversial contrast of modern values with conservative traditions.
Nitrogen-fixing, oxygen-producing cyanobacteria can be grown on Mars at low pressure under controlled conditions using exclusively local ingredients.
MOXIE will produce oxygen experimentally on Mars.
MOXIE can obtain up to 10 grams of oxygen per hour

Scientists at the University of California and Lawrence Berkeley National Laboratory built a prototype biotechnology system that converts electrons from carbon dioxide and water into oxygen and acetate molecules.
The MOXIE installation was used to obtain oxygen from the atmosphere of Mars.
At present, the amount of carbon dioxide on Mars is not enough to make it habitable for humans.
NASA plans to use the MOXIE system for a manned mission to Mars in the next 10 to 15 years.
The technology of extracting oxygen from the atmosphere of Mars will help astronauts produce rocket fuel on the planet.
Transporting oxygen to Mars is not practical.
NASA’s Perseverance successfully converted some of the carbon dioxide in the Martian atmosphere into oxygen.
The test of MOXIE was conducted on April 20.

A team at Washington University in St. Louis has developed a new technology that uses electricity to break down salt water into oxygen and hydrogen, convert it into usable fuel and oxygen, and can operate in the minus 36 degrees Celsius Martian atmosphere.
The bacteria that release oxygen can grow freely in the soil and atmospheric conditions of Mars, simulated on Earth, and also be used as food for other life forms.
At least nine other tests of the MOXIE device have been planned over the course of a Martian year.
Nanowires absorb the sun ’ s energy and deliver electrons to bacteria that are fed carbon dioxide.
The Mars oxygen field resource utilization experimental instrument, MOXIE, makes 5 grams of oxygen from carbon dioxide in the Martian atmosphere.
The atmosphere of Mars contains only 0.13% oxygen, compared to 21% on Earth.

A test vehicle for extracting oxygen from the Martian atmosphere, as well as a "space helicopter" that is set to fly for the first time on a planet other than Earth, are among those on the Perseverance rover.
A thousand people can be sent to Mars by 2030 to create industrial and agricultural opportunities.
The transformation of the local atmosphere with oxygen may allow in the future to produce fuel on Mars
Astronauts who spend a year on the surface of Mars could use a ton of oxygen.
NASA experts received 5.4 grams of oxygen, which would be enough to breathe for 10 minutes, during the first experiment.
Cyanobacteria can be used to feed other microbes.
The test took place on April 20, the 60th Martian day since the mission landed on February 18.
Scientists have developed a method for producing oxygen and hydrogen from a liquid saline solution in Martian lakes using electrolysis.
160 people received a judgment of 6,000 to 9,000 yuan in compensation.
The settlement agreement was unanimously approved by Bayer's Board of Directors and Supervisory Board.
Bayer will pay about $9.5 billion to settle claims filed by lawyers representing some 95,000 plaintiffs.
Monsanto, the developer of glyphosate, was found guilty in 2018 and 2019 of failing to take the necessary steps to warn its herbicide Roundup of the potential risk.
A court in the United States ruled that Bayer should pay $289.2 million to school gardener Diwayne Johnson, who contracted cancer as a result of the use of the herbicide Roundup.
There are at least 125,000 claims related to Roundup, more than double the number of lawsuits related to Roundup that Bayer has disclosed so far.
Bayer’s $10 billion legal battle settlement plan aims to end legal disputes following its acquisition of Monsanto in 2018.

Bayer AG will announce that it has reached an approximately $10.5 billion agreement with plaintiffs in the United States who have accused its Roundup herbicide of causing cancer to settle tens of thousands of lawsuits.
More than 13,400 similar lawsuits against Bayer have been filed in the US courts
Since the first Roundup carcinogenicity conviction, Bayer has lost nearly 46% of its market value and its share price has fallen to 2012 levels.
A lawsuit in 2019 found that a Roundup user, Edwin Hardeman, received $5.3 million in damages from Monsanto for cancer.
China has become the world's largest producer and exporter of glyphosate, and one of the largest users of glyphosate.
3811 people agreed to the settlement and each received a settlement of 6,000 yuan.
The claimants have not yet formally agreed to accept this compensation
The European Food Safety Authority says glyphosate is unlikely to cause cancer in humans.
The Bayer Supervisory Board has just discussed and voted on the settlement, which includes a provision of $2 billion for future claims.
Roundup is Monsanto’s flagship product, with global sales of $4.76 billion in 2015, of which $1.9 billion was for agricultural products, and glyphosate was the largest.
The Pilliod couple used Roundup for four decades, from 1975 to 2011, before being diagnosed with non-Hodgkin lymphoma.
Bayer completed its acquisition of Monsanto in 2018, settling nearly 100,000 cancer lawsuits in the United States in June at a sky-high price of $10.9 billion.
1,861 of the 3,787 plaintiffs in the lawsuit remain unsettled.
Bayer AG reached a settlement to settle 75 percent of the 125,000 lawsuits alleging cancer caused by its top-selling herbicide Roundup.
Bayer faced more than 18,000 lawsuits in the United States as of July this year.
Total sales decreased by 6.2%, a quarterly loss of $11.2 billion against a profit of $475 million for the same period of 2019
The jury decided that Monsanto violated the law by not warning buyers about the likely risks of using Roundup, and ordered the company to pay a fine of $2 billion and $55 million in damages.
The museum gardener was cleaning the ivy on the outer wall when he accidentally found the painting.
The painting was found wrapped in a black plastic garbage bag inside a cavity in the wall closed by an iron door.
Police are questioning the two men, who appear to be members of a large gang, after the local newspaper Libertà received a confession from the two men about the 1997 robbery.
Thieves used a device similar to a fishing rod to remove the painting from the wall and took it out of the gallery through a skylight that had been removed from the glass.

The portrait of a young woman doubled in value when, shortly before it disappeared, an art student noticed that the portrait of the young woman had been painted on the portrait of another young woman.
The thieves said in a letter to Ermanno Marian, an employee of the newspaper Libertà, that they stole the work of the Austrian artist worth 60 million euros in February 1997, and then returned it.
Its authenticity will be determined by the examination.
Experts confirmed the authenticity of the found picture of the Austrian artist Gustav Klimt “Portrait of a woman ”, which was stolen in 1997 from a gallery in the Italian Piacenza.
The painting became the only painting by Gustav Klimt in the art world that has been painted twice.

Italian prosecutor Ornella Chicca said the actual painting was verified as authentic, but it remains unclear whether the painting was later smuggled back into the wall mezzanine or was hidden there from the beginning, pending further examination and clarification.
The painting was stolen on February 22, 1997 from the Ricci Oddi Gallery of Contemporary Art as preparations for the Klimt exhibition were underway.

The lawyer added: “Their statements about the painting are vague, but they claim that the artwork has not been hidden in the wall all these years; if the painting had been kept in that hole all these years, it would not have remained so healthy.”
Italian collector Giuseppe Ricci Oddi bought the painting in 1925 and kept it in the Audi Gallery of Modern Art of the same name until it was stolen on February 22, 1997.
The thieves had confessed to what they had done before, but no one believed them.
The frame of the painting was thrown away on the roof of the gallery building to make it look like thieves broke the frame to pass the painting through the window overlooking the roof.
“Portrait of a Woman ” was painted on top of another canvas by the artist, which no one has seen since 1912.
The two men stole the work of the Austrian artist worth 60 million euros in February 1997, and then returned it, making a “gift to the city”.
The painting features a special symbolic pattern.
The painting found is indeed the “Portrait of a Lady ” by Gustav Klimt, which was stolen from the Ricci Oddi Gallery of Modern Art in 1997.
The painting is considered to be worth a billion dollars.
The painting was stolen in 1997 from the Galleria Ricci Oddi and was included in the list of the most wanted art objects in Italy.
The increase in temperature has caused behavioral changes in the field of agriculture.

The lack of rainfall has made Kermanshah's agricultural lands, especially in the tropical areas of the western province, more thirsty than before, and has caused the loss of some crops and the suffering of farmers.
Farmers should change their management of cultivation.
Proper management in the coming months is very important due to the limitation of water resources
Agriculture will need to be adjusted to climate change
Many of the province’s water wells and springs and aqueducts have dried up over the past few years due to reduced rainfall and the occurrence of drought.
This year's flood has damaged more than 100,000 hectares of agricultural and horticultural land in the province
Climate change has caused Iran to be warmer and less water.
Warm winters will have an impact on crops.
The introduction of technologies such as drip irrigation is necessary for this region.

According to the Ministry of Agriculture, the head of the Dryland Agricultural Research Institute stated: In order to sustain production in dryland, expand genetic diversity, improve the use of green water and improve the livelihoods of farmers, in addition to increasing potentials such as yield and resistance to environmental stresses and diseases in new wheat and barley varieties, the institute is trying to introduce new products from autumn varieties and alternative plants to the dryland fields.
Restoring soil health is necessary to grow stronger crops.

Climatic models show that since the beginning of October in many provinces of the eastern half of the country, such as North Khorasan, South Khorasan, Razavi Khorasan, Semnan, Golestan, Kerman, Isfahan, Yazd, Sistan and Baluchestan, Hormozgan, Fars and even Bushehr have been 50 to 90 percent less than normal rainfall.
The effects of drought go beyond agriculture.
Weather conditions have worsened the quality of grain.
Lack of supply of moisture requirements for garden, agricultural and fodder crops resulted in damage and reduced production

The average rainfall of the province from the beginning of the current year to the end of December was about 131 mm, which was 49% lower than the same period last year and 27% lower than the long-term average.
The Golden Bear was awarded to Iranian director Mohammad Rasoulof ’ s film “There is no Devil ” at the 70th Berlin Film Festival.
Mohammad Rasoulof was not allowed to leave Iran and still won with the film "The Devil Does Not Exist".
Iranian film Innocence wins Golden Bear at Berlin Film Festival
Kaveh Farnam said "no wall can stop the imagination and love" and "These walls only diminish the lives of dictators".
The film also faced challenges on the way to Akron and was initially banned.
The film The Evil and Their Distance breaks the boundaries of national and cultural restrictions.
The film won an Amnesty International award.
Asghar Farhadi won the Silver Bear for Best Director for the film About Elly and the Golden Bear for the film The Separation of Nader from Simin from the Berlin International Film Festival.
The film "There Is No Evil", directed by Iranian dissident director Mohammad Rasoulof, won the Golden Bear Award for Best Picture at the Berlin Film Festival.
Mohammad Rasoulof was sentenced by an Iranian court to one year in prison, and banned from going abroad and participating in social activities for two years.
The film Dressage is the story of passionate, protesting and emotional teenagers who choose rebellion in the face of the anger caused by unequal social conditions and class divisions.
The Iranian film “Final Zone ” has entered the competition section of the Berlin Film Festival
The film explores our responsibilities and choices in life.
The festival is regarded as the most political among the prestigious film festivals around the world
The film “The Devil Does Not Exist” recounts narratives about freedom under the pressure of coercion and deals with the death penalty in Iran.
The Golden Bear for Best Film of the 70th Berlinale goes to "Sheytan vojud nadarad" (There Is No Evil), directed by Mohammad Rasoulof.
The film was shot outside of Iran.
Iranian cinema had won the Berlin Golden Bear with the film “A Separation from Simin ” by Asghar Farhadi.
Mohammad Rasoulof was sentenced to six years in prison and a 20-year ban on filming, interviews and leaving the country.
This violence imposes itself on culture, on life, and even on children’s play.
Satan does not exist is the joint work of Germany, the Czech Republic and Iran
Farhadi canceled his trip to the Academy Awards in protest of US President Donald Trump ’ s ban on Muslim countries.
This film narrates the true story of a person named Hossein Sabzian who introduces himself as a well-known director.
The film won the Golden Bear at the Berlin International Film Festival in 2017 and brought the director to fame.
Asghar Farhadi's film "The Separation" won the Golden Bear Award for Best Film and the Oscar for Best Foreign Film.
Britain and France have agreed to strengthen joint patrols and expand the tracking system in the English Channel to cope with the flow of migrants trying to illegally cross the strait by boat.
The UK made changes to the immigration system to make it harder for people who enter the country illegally.

Christophe Castaner announced via Twitter on Sunday that he had spoken by phone with Javid and that they had agreed to tighter monitoring of the English Channel route to counter illegal immigration to Britain.
Around 8,000 people have illegally immigrated to the UK on 345 boats.
The men were citizens of Iran and Iraq.
The French government will double the number of police patrols on its shores as part of an agreement with Britain to stop migrants from crossing the Channel
At least 976 people, including 89 children, have crossed the English Channel to reach the UK since 3 November 2018.
On Friday, December 28, the border police arrested 12 people from Syria and Iran who had arrived on two inflatable boats off the coast of Britain.
French and British authorities rescued 2,758 illegal migrants trying to cross the Channel in 2019, four times more than in 2018, according to French officials.
Kamal Hosseinpuor told the event website about the migration of young people of Sardasht that most of these migrants are men and about 20 to 30 percent are people who have immigrated as a family.
Home Office proposes tougher punishment for illegal migrants from six months in prison to four years
235 illegal migrants in 17 boats attempting to cross the English Channel from northern France were intercepted by British Coast Guard and Border Guard officers on Thursday.

At least four people were killed, including two children aged five and eight, and 15 others were rescued when a boat carrying human snakes sank off the British Channel off Dunkirk, France, on Tuesday.
The Home Office is investigating reports that a British border patrol vessel had requested entry into French waters and that asylum seekers had been taken from a boat en route to Britain.
In 2017, about 9% of all 26,350 asylum applications were submitted by Iranians.
A significant number of the refugees were Iranian, Afghan and Syrian.
The rescued migrants were taken to Calais, where they received medical care
The Stratolaunch aircraft made the first test flight on Saturday, April 13
Launching rockets from the air can save costs by using a mature aero engine and reducing the need for a high-cost rocket engine.
The plane took off from a test site in the Mojave Desert, the flight lasted 2.5 hours at an altitude of more than 5 kilometers with a maximum speed of 304 kilometers per hour.
The Stratolaunch underwent a series of engine tests and sailed on a desert runway in Mojave, California, to adjust its glide speed.
The Stratolaunch aircraft is equipped with six twin-circuit Pratt & Whitney turbojet engines
The Stratolaunch is designed to transport small satellites to Earth’s orbit as a means of launching satellites.
The central part of the Stratolaunch aircraft is designed to mount space rockets
The aircraft is being developed to deliver missiles to the stratosphere
The Stratolaunch aircraft weighs 230 tons.
The aircraft is considered the largest in the world.
Stratolaunch can provide simultaneous launch of three missiles of the Pegasus type.
The Stratolaunch aircraft has two fuselages and a wingspan of 117 meters, which is more than the wingspan of any other aircraft that has ever taken to the sky.
Paul Allen, the former founder of Microsoft, funded the Stratolaunch aircraft.
During its test flight on Thursday, Stratolaunch reached an altitude of 14,000 feet (4,267 m) and a top speed of 199 mph (320 km / h).
Stratolaunch is powered by six Pratt & Whitney PW4056 engines.
Stratolaunch is designed to launch small rockets from the stratosphere into low Earth orbit.
The aircraft reached a maximum speed of 189 miles per hour and flew at an altitude of 17,000 feet during a test.
Stratolaunch plans to carry future spacecraft to high altitude.
The aircraft is designed to carry a satellite rocket between the two cabins, and to launch the rocket at an altitude of 10 kilometers.
The world ’ s largest aircraft took off for the second time.
The aircraft will carry one missile at the first stage, in the future - up to three missiles fixed in the lower part of the fuselage.
Its maximum take-off weight is 589.7 tons.
Paul Allen, Microsoft co-founder and sponsor of the Stratolaunch project, did not live to see the stratosphere launch.
A woman with a poster tried to get into the frame in front of the peloton and was hit by a German cyclist Tony Martin.
The woman has been officially identified and was detained minutes ago.

French military and police authorities announced that they would conduct an investigation into the incident, which resulted in involuntary injury due to a deliberate breach of safety obligations, and that it would be completed within three months.
The accident was caused by a fan who went out on the track with a poster to attract the attention of television viewers.
The woman turned her back on the driver and raised a sign reading “Greet Grandpa and Grandma ” in front of the camera.
The accident occurred on the Brest to Landerneau road, where the French woman waved a cardboard reading “Grandpa and Grandma” in the mirror.
If the affected riders file lawsuits against her, the punishment may be more severe - up to a year in prison.
Another major accident occurred with about 7.6 km to the finish line, this time at a higher speed.
French police have detained a 30-year-old French woman in connection with the case.
Both incidents took place during the opening phase of the Tour de France.
Her sudden appearance led to the fall of dozens of riders, with two - a German and a Spaniard - injured and forced to retire from the race.
Participants of the bike ride submitted a collective request to the police due to the large total damage caused by the sabotage.
Several cyclists were injured, 21 of which required medical attention
Police said the woman fled the scene after the incident.
Police say they have filed a criminal case for the incident.
Another accident occurred 8 kilometers from the end, injuring up to 12 people, including famous driver Chris Froome, who will withdraw from the competition.
Tour de France spokesman Pierre Yves told AFP that charges will be brought against the woman
The accident happened 45 kilometers from the finish when a woman wearing a bright yellow coat with sunglasses stood by the track holding a card that read “ALLEZ OPI-OMI ” in French.
French gendarmerie lieutenant colonel Joël Scherer said the woman could face charges of clearly and deliberately violating the duty of care and accidentally causing short-term harm.
Experts believe that this is one of the biggest accidents in the history of the Tour de France.
A 30-year-old French woman turned herself in to the police station and has now been released on bail.
A volunteer cyclist stopped and warned colleagues about the danger, helping hundreds of people to escape from breakdowns.
Crew Dragon can be used multiple times for space missions.
The mission is experimental and the risk is higher than in the past
SpaceX successfully launched the Falcon 9 rocket sending the new Crew Dragon spacecraft carrying American astronauts Bob Behnken and Douglas Hurley to the International Space Station (ISS).
SpaceX has successfully tested the ejection system of the manned spacecraft Crew Dragon.
The United States has paid Russia from 55 million to 80 million dollars for a place on the Soyuz spacecraft, which goes to the ISS
Crew Dragon is the first private spacecraft in history to take astronauts to the ISS.
The American astronauts returned to Earth after two months on the ISS, where they were delivered by the same ship Crew Dragon.
The United States has been able to send astronauts into space from its soil for the first time since the retirement of NASA's shuttle fleet in 2011.
The Dragon was launched from the Kennedy Space Center in Florida aboard a SpaceX Falcon 9 rocket on May 30.
SpaceX participates in the NASA Commercial Crew Program to deliver astronauts into space.
NASA astronauts Michael Hopkins, Victor Glover, Shannon Walker, and Japanese astronaut Soichi Noguchi were sent to the International Space Station for a six-month stay.
This is the first official NASA mission to use a private company spacecraft to carry astronauts.
SpaceX plans to carry private company astronauts and even tourists to space.
Boeing’s contract with NASA is worth $4.3 billion and SpaceX’s contract is worth $2 billion
The crew of the Dragon capsule landed with a parachute at 2:48 p.m. local time on Sunday, August 2, near Pensacola, Florida
SpaceX plans to participate in manned missions to the Moon and Mars.
SpaceX ’ s technology opens a new page in space exploration.
Limitations caused by the coronavirus outbreak caused few people to attend the launch ceremony.
Space Exploration Technologies plans another mission in the spring of 2021.
The Crew Dragon spacecraft has a crew emergency rescue system in case of an emergency.
After six days in space, the Crew Dragon splashed into the Atlantic Ocean
This is the first time that the United States has used domestic rockets and spacecraft to send astronauts from home to the space station since the retirement of the space shuttle in 2011.
SpaceX mission re-launched: US near-Earth space flight officially entered the commercial era
The draft memorandum does not specify who is responsible for the payment of compensation, and there are no clear provisions for identifying Iran's obligations and the timing of their implementation
The ruling effectively allows families in Canada to claim damages from Iran.

Iran’s ambassador to Kiev, Manouchehr Moradi, announced that Iran is prepared to pay compensation in accordance with international rules and Iran’s obligations under the conventions in which it is a party.

Scientists have confirmed a sufficient number of whales
Japan will be able to catch whales in its internal waters, where they are now hunted for these animals "for scientific purposes".
Whaling is part of the Japanese tradition.
Japan has decided to withdraw from the International Whaling Commission (IWC).
Whale meat is the main source of protein for poor Japanese society after World War II, but consumption has declined significantly in recent decades.
The decision of the Japanese authorities was criticized by activists and countries not engaged in whaling
Iceland and Norway have traditionally opposed the moratorium on whaling in addition to Japan.
Hideki Abe, a 22-year-old whaling crew member, said “After the resumption of commercial whaling, I hope that the younger generation will also be able to eat whale meat”.
Whaling ships have already departed from the port of Kushiro in Hokkaido and Shimonoseki in Yamaguchi Prefecture to operate in Japan ’ s exclusive economic zone
International conservation organizations have expressed strong dissatisfaction with Japan's decision to restart commercial whaling
Commercial fishing, climate change, and water pollution pose a danger to whale populations.
Japan has set a limit of 227 for whaling up to the end of December this year.
Japan will remain as an observer in organizations such as the IWC Scientific Committee.
Japan is currently not allowed to hunt whales in international waters.
In the 1960s, the Japanese consumed 200,000 metric tons of whale meat a year, but in recent years it has been greatly reduced, with annual consumption of only about 5,000 metric tons.
Some countries are dissatisfied that the whaling is outdated and harmful.
Australia, the main country that opposes whaling, has said it will join other countries in opposing Japan’s attempt to undermine the current ban on commercial whaling.
